title: Instant Employee ↔ Customer folder switch
description:
Switching Folder System between Employee and Customer no longer blanks the file list and waits on a cold tree fetch.

PipeShare now keeps each job’s shallow listing in an in-tab stash, paints it immediately on switch, refreshes quietly in the background, and prefetches the partner tree after boot so the first flip is already warm. On private BASE, admin Folder System jobId deep links are honored (they were previously ignored).

Who is affected: PipeShare Folder System on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Stash Employee and Customer trees in-tab for instant Folder System switches.
Paint cached/stashed listing immediately; background refresh instead of blank loading.
Prefetch partner job tree after boot so the first switch is already warm.
Honor Folder System ?jobId= on private BASE for admins (Employee ↔ Customer).
